title: hair care routine for guys
description:
In this video, we discuss how to take care of your hair so it's nice, sleek, and amazing looking.

Get OnPointFresh Hair! https://shop.onpointfresh.com/ Use Code: FRESH10 for 10% OFF Your Order!

comments.text: I highly recommend to install a shower filter to help not just your hair but your skin. I recently got the aqua bliss shower filter and I immediately noticed a change. My hair is softer and wasnt as dry compared to before. If you live in a city or your water is harsh, GET ONE.
comments.author: @rblxmatic

comments.text: Conditioners are a must, especially for dry hair. I noticed a difference when combining with nordic biolabs products. This video really highlights the essentials.

comments.text: I love watching your videos even though I'm a girl. I hope you know that all the advice you give is a wonderfully condensed and straightforward version of most "girl care" content, yet I am somehow more drawn to your style of videos for their simplicity. Keep up the incredible work!
comments.author: @김민석-r9r5u

comments.text: Indian guy here. Indians are known to have thick, soft snd shiny hair. Here's a tip straight from my Indian mother. Take some coconut oil, and heat it up. Massage it into your hair thoroughly and let it sit for atleast half an hour (ideally go atleast for an hour or two) Then rinse it out with shampoo. Conditioner is optional since your hair is probably already soft due to the oil. Do this 1-2 times a week. You can also experiment with 'Amla oil' (easily available online) and see if you like that more, it has a really strong smell though.
comments.author: @idkatthispoint-s9s

Extra Routine:

Get Yourself 1 Sharp Clipper And Use It For A "Line Up" Every Week, Do It Every Sunday/Monday Before You Got Out, This Make Hair More Fresh And Last Longer If You Trying To Grow Out Your Hair

comments.text: no shampoo no extra products is also an option (it will look greasy for sometime then hair will produce natural oils making it have texture and no greasiness) it will also make your life much more easy trust me I've done this for 1 month and im seeing results my dandruff has reduced too
comments.author: @Clortezz

comments.text: I have begun to take care of my hair very much. I have wavy hair and I use sulfate free schampoo, conditioner, leave in conditioner, and also a hair mask. Everything but the conditioner I only do once a week. Conditioner is every other day. It has been amazing result. Do not shower your hair in too warm water, also end every shower with icecold water, to lock the moisture in your hair better. Last but not least, you got to have products designed for your hair!
comments.author: @simulki7108

comments.text: Normally it is recommended that u oil ur hair once a week but i suggest u oil your hair a few hours before you shampoo your hair everytime, it will prevent hair from drying too much after shampooing, also u can try deep conditioning conditioner.
